title: Bletia × elegans
taxonomy: Bletia × elegans is classified as a hybrid orchid. It is a cross between Bletia purpurea and Bletia brownii. This classification makes it a distinct species within the Bletia genus. Bletia × elegans is a popular choice for orchid enthusiasts due to its unique appearance and relatively easy cultivation. Its classification as a hybrid orchid reflects its complex genetic makeup and resulting distinct characteristics.
